title: The Weekly Dispatch
preheader: This week: streaming APIs, a new studio, and three quick wins.
body_html:
What shipped this week

Hello there,

We rolled out streaming APIs, opened the new recording studio, and cleaned up a handful of rough edges you told us about.

Hit the button below for the full write-up, including the migration notes.
